name: Goldenhair, the Newest Plunder Patroll
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海造賊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>プランドロール</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>金</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>髪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぱつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>訓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>練</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can send 1 other "Plunder Patroll" Monster Card from your hand or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon this card, but you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except "Plunder Patroll" monsters. You can only use each effect of "Goldenhair, the Newest Plunder Patroll" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can send 1 other "Plunder Patroll" Monster Card from your hand or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon this card, but you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except "Plunder Patroll" monsters. You can only use each effect of "Goldenhair, the Newest Plunder Patroll" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
